programmes.show_description: Add fun camping designs to your crafting projects! Make these adorable critters and pair them with their favourite campy activity. So, which cute critter is your favourite?
Introducing Spring Gardens, exclusively created with Linsey Kelly, featuring her iconic whimsical flora and fauna. A modern day collection inspired by the likes of William Morris.
Based in the UK, AALL & Create is your one stop shop for mixed media inspiration and essentials.
The Anna Griffin Create box is thoughtfully curated with coordinating cardstock, cards, sentiments, diecuts, 3D stickers, dies and more. Tune in to learn more this hour!
Catch up on another afternoon of fun and crafting on Hobbymaker! Some items may have sold out since original broadcast.

Celebrate iconic design s this hour - featuring beautiful fabrics and sewing essentials inspired by timeless patterns.

...Patterns: Alistair MacDonald will be back and bringing us brand new Broderie Anglaise Fabrics, cut out fabrics and how-to patterns.
Perfect your fit and finish - from adjustable dress forms to essential tools, discover everything you need to elevate your dressmaking projects with confidence and precision.

...Month: Stuart Hillard is going to be launching his April Block of the Month.
...Garden Quilt: Delphine Brooks is going to be launching the brand new Riley Blake Jennifer Long Garden Spools Quilt kit.
...Stuart Hillard: Stuart's Lewis & Irene Porcelain and Sea Glass fabric collection is back in stock, get it whilst stock's last.
